summary: Iteration 78: Tested Messages/Alerts restructure into Loyalty page. Backend tests 16/16 PASSED. Frontend verification confirmed: 1) Customer sidebar no longer has 'Messages & Alerts' (has 'Loyalty' only), 2) Loyalty page has 4 tabs (My Rewards, Activity, Rewards, Messages), 3) Messages tab has sub-tabs (Alerts, Notifications), 4) /alerts redirects to /loyalty?tab=messages correctly, 5) /notifications route configured correctly (429 rate limiting during test prevented verification), 6) Notification dropdown marks as read on click.
critical_code_review_comments: useSidebarMenu.js correctly removes 'Messages & Alerts' from customer sidebar (lines 88-109)
CustomerLoyaltyView.jsx has 4 tabs with grid-cols-4 and includes Messages tab (line 131)
MessagesTab.jsx has Alerts and Notifications sub-tabs with proper data-testid attributes
Layout.jsx notification dropdown calls markAsRead and navigates correctly (lines 776-779)
subscriptions.py sets action_url=/loyalty?tab=messages for new alerts (line 250)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Messages/Alerts restructure verified: sidebar no longer has standalone 'Messages & Alerts', Loyalty page has 4 tabs including Messages, Messages tab has Alerts/Notifications sub-tabs, /alerts and /notifications redirect to /loyalty?tab=messages

sidebar_restructure.customer_sidebar: No longer has 'Messages & Alerts' - only Dashboard, Services, My Orders, Receipts, Loyalty, My Ratings, Support, Settings

messages_subtabs.alerts_subtab: Shows only type='alert' items from subscribed operators
messages_subtabs.notifications_subtab: Shows all notifications with mark-as-read/delete functionality

route_redirects./notifications: Redirects to /loyalty?tab=messages - CONFIGURED (rate limiting prevented test verification)

notification_dropdown.navigation: Clicking navigates to /loyalty?tab=messages for operator alerts/promotions

rewards_tab_promotions.operator_promotions: Approved promotions from operators shown in Rewards tab
